zh.lifeSummary: 當Amauberge de l'Isle Bouchard Dangereuse於1079年出生在法國阿奎泰時，她的父親Bartholomew de L'isle Bouchard30歲，母親Gerberge de Blaison26歲。她和Aimery I de CHATELLERAULT至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1151年11月7日在法國崔英德-吉洛易利i爾 布哈德享年72歲，埋葬在法國崔英德-吉洛易利i爾 布哈德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Amauberge de l'Isle Bouchard Dangereuse于1079年出生在法国阿奎泰时，她的父亲Bartholomew de L'isle Bouchard30岁，母亲Gerberge de Blaison26岁。她和Aimery I de CHATELLERAULT至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1151年11月7日在法国崔英德-吉洛易利i爾 布哈德享年72岁，埋葬在法国崔英德-吉洛易利i爾 布哈德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: l'Isle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northumberland, Durham, and Yorkshire): variant of   Lyle   and a cognate of 2 below.
French: habitational name from L'Isle or Lisle, names of several places in various parts of France, named with Old French isle ‘island’ (from Latin insula). Compare Delisle .

variants.name: Lyle
meanings: Scottish and English (of Norman origin): topographic or habitational name from Anglo-Norman French del isle ‘from the island’ (from Latin de insula), denoting someone who lived on an island or who came from a place in France named Ile, Isle, or L'Isle. The surname may also in some cases be from Lille (Nord). Compare Lisle and Iles .

variants.name: Lile
meanings: English and French: variant of   Lisle  .

nameMeanings.name: Bouchard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Marcel, Andre, Michel, Normand, Pierre, Cecile, Gilles, Lucien, Alphonse, Jacques, Alain.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Burchard, composed of the elements burg ‘protection’ and hard ‘hard, strong’.

French: in some cases, possibly also a nickname for someone with a big mouth (in either a literal or figurative sense), from bouche ‘mouth’ + the pejorative suffix -ard. Compare Buschor , Bushard , Bushaw , and Bushor .

variants.name: Bushard
meanings: Possibly, in some cases, also an Americanized form of German Buschard (see Bushart 2).

variants.name: Buschor
meanings: Swiss German: probably a Germanized form of French   Bouchard  . Compare   Buschur   and   Bushor  .

variants.name: Bushore
meanings: Americanized form of French Bouchard , reflecting the characteristic Canadian and American French rounding of the -ard ending. Compare Bushor .

en.lifeSummary: When Amauberge de l'Isle Bouchard Dangereuse was born in 1079, in Aquitaine, France, her father, Bartholomew de L'isle Bouchard, was 30 and her mother, Gerberge de Blaison, was 26. She had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Aimery I de CHATELLERAULT. She died on 7 November 1151, in L'Île Bouchard, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, France, at the age of 72, and was buried in L'Île Bouchard, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Amauberge de l'Isle Bouchard Dangereuse est née en 1079, à Aquitaine, France, son père, Bartholomew de L'isle Bouchard, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Gerberge de Blaison, avait 26 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Aimery I de CHATELLERAULT. Elle est décédée le 7 novembre 1151, à L'Île Bouchard, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, France, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterrée à L'Île Bouchard, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Amauberge de l'Isle Bouchard Dangereuse 1079 in Aquitaine, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Bartholomew de L'isle Bouchard 30 und ihre Mutter Gerberge de Blaison 26. Sie hatte mit Aimery I de CHATELLERAULT mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 7. November 1151 im Alter von 72 Jahren in L'Île Bouchard, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, Frankreich und wurde in L'Île Bouchard, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Amauberge de l'Isle Bouchard Dangereuse è nata il nel 1079 nel Aquitaine, Francia, sua padre, Bartholomew de L'isle Bouchard, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Gerberge de Blaison, aveva 26 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Aimery I de CHATELLERAULT. Morì il 7 novembre 1151, nel L'Île Bouchard, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, Francia, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolta a L'Île Bouchard, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Amauberge de l'Isle Bouchard Dangereuseが1079年にフランスアクイティアインで生まれた時，父Bartholomew de L'isle Bouchardは30歳，母Gerberge de Blaisonは26歳であった。彼女はAimery I de CHATELLERAULTとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1151年11月7日にフランスセントアインドレ-エト-ロイアール'iル ボウチャードで72歳で死去し，フランスセントアインドレ-エト-ロイアール'iル ボウチャードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Amauberge de l'Isle Bouchard Dangereuse(이)가 1079년 프랑스 아키테인에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Bartholomew de L'isle Bouchard(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gerberge de Blaison(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 Aimery I de CHATELLERAULT(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1151년 11월 7일 프랑스 세트르 인드레-트-로이르 'i일 부처드에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 세트르 인드레-트-로이르 'i일 부처드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Amauberge de l'Isle Bouchard Dangereuse nasceu em 1079, em Aquitaine, França, seu pai, Bartholomew de L'isle Bouchard, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Gerberge de Blaison, tinha 26 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Aimery I de CHATELLERAULT. Ela faleceu em 7 de novembro de 1151, em L'Île Bouchard, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, França, com 72 anos, e foi sepultada em L'Île Bouchard, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Amauberge de l'Isle Bouchard Dangereuse родилась в 1079 г. в местности аквитеин, Франция, её отцу по имени Bartholomew de L'isle Bouchard было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Gerberge de Blaison, 26. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Aimery I de CHATELLERAULT. Она умерла 7 ноября 1151 г. в местности л'iл боучард, индре-ет-лоир, кентр, Франция в возрасте 72 лет и была похоронена в местности л'iл боучард, индре-ет-лоир, кентр, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Amauberge de l'Isle Bouchard Dangereuse nació en 1079, en Aquitaine, Francia, su papá, Bartholomew de L'isle Bouchard, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Gerberge de Blaison, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Aimery I de CHATELLERAULT. Murió el 7 de noviembre de 1151, en L'Île Bouchard, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, Francia, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultada en L'Île Bouchard, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, Francia.
